title: Mediterranean Flatbread Pizza
description: A vegetarian flatbread pizza topped with Mediterranean flavors and pickled vegetables.
instructions: Roll out the flatbread to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Spread the olive oil evenly over the flatbread, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the minced garlic over the olive oil.
Top the flatbread with the Mediterranean pickled vegetables, feta cheese, and chopped parsley.
Season with salt, black pepper, and red pepper flakes to taste.
Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
Slice the flatbread into wedges or squares and serve immediately.
